Petition For Redistribution On Interest In The Matter Of The Estate Of Audrey Sue Woo
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ashley M. DeGuzman, via Zoom, for and with Janelle Louie, Petitioner.

Counsel reports that her client has decided to create an assignment for a special needs trust. The court confirms with counsel that the court can take the instant petition off calendar accordingly.

The Petition for Redistribution, etc., is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition For Redistribution On Interest In The Matter Of The Estate Of Audrey Sue Woo
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Continued To Aug-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janelle Louie, via Zoom, Petitioner.

The court notes that Ms. Louie's counsel is not present today. The court advises Ms. Louie that it is not ready to grant the petition that is set for hearing this morning as it does not appear to be the proper vehicle based on the allegations in the petition. The court offers Ms. Louie other options for her and her counsel to consider such as an assignment or establishing a special needs trust.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Aug-01-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Accounting Petition currently set for Jul-18-2022, is continued by the judicial officer in open court to Aug-01-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Erik Larson, via ZOOM, for Betty Yee, Personal Representative; Amanda Ebey, via ZOOM, for Mae Woo, via ZOOM, Objector; Bruce Feder, via ZOOM, for Terrence Wu, via ZOOM, Beneficiary; Stephanie Fung, via ZOOM, Interested Party.

Mr. Larson reports that Ms. Ebey is not objecting to the Petitions on calendar today and to date, no objections have been presented to his client nor her counsel. Mr. Larson points to the supplement recently filed for additional information regarding both his client's and counsel's positions. Ms. Ebey confirms that her client is not opposing the petitions on today's calendar. Mr. Feder and the court discuss the court's decision on the crossed-out item in paragraph 17 and bond distributions in lines 24-25. Mr. Feder presents oral advocacy regarding his position that the crossing-out of the bank account number should revoke the gift and become part of the residuary distribution and argues that there is a lack of supporting documentation to support the decedent's intent.

After additional discussion, Petition for Determination, etc., and Accounting Status Petition are submitted. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Mar-29-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is advised that if a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Mar-15-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-27-2021 Continued To Sep-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erik Larsen, via ZOOM, for Betty Yee, via ZOOM, Administrator; Bruce Feder, via ZOOM, for Darryl Woo and Terrence Woo, Beneficiaries.

The court begins by asking counsel for an update regarding the opening of the estate of Frederick Woo. Mr. Feder reports that issue is complicated. The court has recently denied appointment of temporary conservatorship of Mae Woo and the hearing on the appointment of the general conservatorship is set for 8/26/2021. Mr. Feder reports that he and opposing counsel have been working on settling including regarding who would file the petition regarding Frederick Woo's estate. The court suggests continuing this matter so that the parties can continue to discuss settling the matter of Frederick Woo's estate.

The Petition for Determination, etc., Status of Opening Estate for Frederick Woo, and Status on Close of Estate, are continued to September 7, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Tso. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-15-2021 Continued To Jul-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erik Larson, via ZOOM, counsel for Betty Yee, Executor; Bruce Feder, via ZOOM, counsel for Darrel Woo, Beneficiary.

The court begins by asking Mr. Feder if he is appearing to object to the petition. Mr. Feder reports that he is not but that he may file a petition soon. The court then advises counsel that this petition may not be able to be resolved without opening a probate for Frederick Woo. Court and counsel discuss the decedent's admitted Will which included several interlineations as well as to whether the changes to the different accounts were made by the decedent. After additional discussion, the court directs counsel to meet and confer to discuss how to proceed with this matter. Mr. Larson is directed to submit a new [proposed] order to the court before the next calling of this case.

The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution is continued to July 27, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status on Opening of Estate for Frederick Woo is added for the same date and time. Status on Close of Estate set in this matter for July 28, 2021 is advanced to July 27, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melissa Littau appeared by telephone for Betty Lee.

The Court asked Ms. Littau how she sees the 11700 petition being adjudicated. Ms. Littau stated that she doesn't know, that there are a lot of issues with the will and that she doesn't know if they are expecting an evidentiary hearing. Ms. Littau also stated that they are asking for a nine month extension from the month of October and that the Attorney of record is hoping that the 11700 petition will resolve this. The Court noted that the 11700 petition provides a distribution, but also provides an alternative and that it will need more information. The Petition for Report on Status of Administration is under submission. Status on close of estate is set for July 28, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A petition is to be filed one week prior.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any counsel, party, or interested persons.

The matter is again called at 10:55 a.m. and no appearance is made either in person, by telephone, or by video conference.

An Order to Appear shall issue to the Executor, Betty J. Lee, and her legal counsel, Michael Yee, Esq. to appear on November 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear at hearing on October 7, 2020 and why no Petition for Final Distribution or Report on the Status of Administration and Petition for Additional Time to Administer Estate was filed.

The instant matter is continued to November 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.
